title: Momonosuke Becomes Shogun
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Wano Citizens, Green Bull as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Don't get too buddy-buddy with them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't let our guards down till we're safely back at sea!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't know how the information is gonna leak...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you can be damn sure that the papers will catch wind of what's happened!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With the emporors gone, we're gonna have the biggest targets on our backs!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Gulp...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That's right.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Being in a closed off country doesn't necessarily mean they can't find out...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it does mean we have no way to monitor what their response will be.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Do you think the captain's bounty will...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They might raise it to an unthinkable large amount...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: APAPAPA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Apoo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: And a number?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're right, it leaked!! How could this be possible?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It was obviously you! You damn bastard!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Check it out! J the Bounties you're oh so curious about!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: APAPAPA!! Wanna take a peek?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It's all in there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Your updated boundaries and the names...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...of those who have been newly dubbed emporors of the sea!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Tell me your exact position!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just said, Sakazuki-san, I'm in the sky!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...Be more specific!!

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: Ah! I can see wano up ahead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You are not to do anything unnecessary...

dialogue.speaker: Green Bull
dialogue.text: Understood, RYokugyuZ!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I know, I know already!! Goodness...

dialogue.speaker: Green Bull
dialogue.text: Admiral, Green Bull is in play!!)

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 30 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
